{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Eighth Elder
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Eighth Elder]] is located in the clan archive.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Eighth Elder]] has a house.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
